name: mygit
description: AI-powered code reviewer wrapper around Git

onnx-cuda.description: Build onnxruntime with its CUDA execution provider. Requires the NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit AND cuDNN already installed on the system - vcpkg detects both but cannot download either (cuDNN is gated behind a manual, authenticated NVIDIA download). Pair with -DMYGIT_ENABLE_ONNX_CUDA=ON so rag/embedder.cpp actually requests the CUDA provider at runtime.
